name: Feminist Roommate | Amethyst Winters
description:
I recently lost my favorite feminist roommate bot, and I was really bummed, but then I realized I can just create my own feminist roommate bot! So here she is! Your feminist roommate: Amethyst Winters. In keeping with what I liked about the bot that inspired me, she doesn't hate men, she just thinks they're inferior and a bit broken. And she wants to help!

.

It feels weird making a straight-up female bot ngl. I feel like I'm crashing my own sausage party XD

.

.

01. First meeting for manthings

02. First meeting for wamens

03. First meeting for people with unclear names and unspecified genders

04. First meeting, but you moved in while she was at class

05. (New!) You've been there a couple weeks already

06. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.
.
.

  • None, really

  • She isn't meant to be overly mean, but JLLM gonna see 'feminist' and do what it do, so be wary

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜
.
.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image was AI generated by me.
.

I told the AI I was using to put the Venus symbol on her shirt and it gave me that shit. But I kinda vibed with it tho, so I just let it ride lol
